agathas-oversized-cinnamon-rolls.name: Agatha's Oversized Cinnamon Rolls
instructions: Combine 1 cup flour, sugar, yeast, and salt in a mixing bowl.
Heat milk and butter chunks in a saucepan over medium-low heat until butter has melted and mixture is 43°C (43 degrees C), about 5 minutes.

Pour warm milk mixture into the yeast mixture and beat for 2 minutes with an electric mixer. Add 1 cup flour and egg; beat for 2 minutes. Stir in 1 1/2 cups flour and knead until smooth. Knead for an additional 10 minutes, gradually adding in remaining 1/4 cup flour. Shape dough into a ball.
Grease a bowl and place dough inside. Turn dough over so the greased side is facing up, cover, and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and let rest for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, combine brown sugar and cinnamon in a small bowl. Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Roll dough on a lightly floured surface to an 8x24-inch rectangle and spread with softened butter. Sprinkle cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over top and then sprinkle with walnuts and raisins.

Roll dough into a 24-inch log, starting at the long edge closest to you. Slice log lengthwise down the middle, making two 24-inch long strips of dough. Place dough strips next to each other with cut sides facing up. Press together one set of ends and twist strips around each other tightly, keeping cut sides up. Pinch ends together to secure.

Slice twisted log into 6 pieces and press ends together firmly. Place in the prepared baking pan and press down to ensure rolls are an even height. Cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Bake rolls in the preheated oven until top is golden brown, about 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to cool slightly.
Mix confectioners' sugar and water together to a drizzling consistency, and drizzle over warm rolls.

air-fryer-eggplant-lasagna-pequerecetas.name: Air Fryer Eggplant Lasagna
air-fryer-eggplant-lasagna-pequerecetas.original_name: Lasaña de berenjenas en freidora de aire

ingredients.item: ½ kg minced beef or mixed beef
390 g de tomate tamizado o tomate triturado
Queso mozzarella rallado o cualquier otro queso que gratine bien

instructions: We cut the eggplant into thin sheets with a mandolin or with a sharp knife. We sprinkle with salt and let them rest for half an hour to let go of the bitterness.
While resting an eggplant we cut into brunoise (small cubits) 1 / 2 onion and carrot. We also stung his garlic tooth very thin.
We put some olive oil into a frying pan and add onion, garlic and carrot. We have been pounding slightly and we have been pounding with light fire.

After resting time we rinsed the eggplant and dried. We put the eggplant sheets in the air fryer. We pinch with extra virgin olive oil and cook at the air fryer for 7 minutes at 180 ° C. After our time we get out and reserve.
We added ½ kg of minced meat to the frying pan and we dabbled till they change their color.

We add the 390 g of steamed tomato (you can also use crushed tomato), we pat and we add a teaspoon of oregan. We let them cook at medium low heat for 15 minutes. After his time we put out his fire and put an end to them.
We added some tomato sauce to an air frying plate at the bottom. Then we put up a first cape of eggplants we had booked.
We added a cape of minced meat, spreading with a spoon.
We added a cape of cottage cheese above.
Vamos haciendo capas de berenjena, carne picada y queso cottage hasta llenar el molde. Terminamos con una capa generosa de queso mozzarella rallado.
We place at the air fryer and cook at 180 ° C for 15 minutes.
Pasado el tiempo sacamos de la freidora de aire.
We serve hot at once, but we can also put them in the refrigerator and let them stand up to put them up. To serve it we only have to reheat at the air frying or microwave for a few minutes.

air-fryer-tilapia-milanese-for-two.name: Air Fryer Tilapia Milanese For Two
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Pat tilapia fillets dry using a paper towel. Coat both sides of fish with flour.
Whisk egg, lemon juice, and salt together in a shallow bowl. Place bread crumbs and lemon-pepper seasoning in a separate shallow bowl.
Dip flour-coated fish first in egg and then in bread crumb mixture. Press down on the fish so that the bread crumbs stick. Spray both sides of fish with cooking spray.
Place fillets in the air fryer basket and cook for 5 minutes. Flip fish over using a spatula and cook for 3 minutes more. Serve with lemon wedges.

air-fryer-chicken-tikka.name: Air-fryer Chicken Tikka

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep:
thinly sliced red onion, warm naan or cooked
rice, and lemon wedges (for serving)

instructions: Mix together 8 garlic cloves, finely grated, one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, ½ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, ¼ cup fresh lemon juice, 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil, 1 Tbsp. mild curry powder, 1 Tbsp. paprika, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, ½ tsp. cayenne pepper, and ½ tsp. ground cardamom in a medium bowl. Add 1 lb. skinless, boneless chicken thighs (about 4), halved crosswise, and turn to coat on all sides. Let sit at room temperature at least 15 minutes, or cover and chill up to 12 hours.

Heat air fryer to 400°. Lightly coat air-fryer basket with nonstick vegetable oil spray and arrange chicken in a single layer in basket (the pieces will touch). Cook chicken 10 minutes, then turn and continue to cook until chicken is cooked through and charred in spots, 15–20 minutes more.

Arrange chicken on a platter and sprinkle with a generous pinch of flaky sea salt. Pile some cucumber spears alongside, then top with thinly sliced red onion. Serve with naan or cooked rice and lemon wedges for squeezing over.

amish-friendship-banana-nut-bread.name: Amish Friendship Banana Nut Bread
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease two 9x5-inch loaf pans.
Mash together shortening and bananas in a large bowl, then stir in Amish starter, eggs, sugar, walnuts, and milk.
Sift together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Fold into the banana mixture. Divide batter evenly into the prepared pans.
Bake in preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the loaves comes out clean, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Cool loaves until they loosen evenly from the pan before removing to a wire rack to cool completely, about 10 minutes.

and-delicious-recipe-for-chocolate-brown.name: And Delicious Recipe For Chocolate Brownies With Almonds
and-delicious-recipe-for-chocolate-brown.original_name: Receta fácil y deliciosa de brownies de chocolate con almendras

ingredients.item: 200  gramos de chocolate negro (al menos 70% de cacao, para que el sabor sea intenso)
200 grams of brown sugar (give them a more caramelated touch!)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 ° C. Meanwhile, prepare a square or rectangular mold with an enlarging and pounding. If you have no flour, you can use some butter to grease the mold.

Drop the chocolate and butter: In a hot-proof bowl, place the chocolate and butter. Put them into the microwave at 30-second intervals and move them between each interval, till they melt them all. If you prefer to do it to the tiddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd@@
Mezcla los ingredientes secos: En otro bol, mezcla la harina, la levadura y la sal. Reserva.

Combines everything: In a big bowl, beat the eggs with the sugar till they are sparkling. It then incorporates the mixture of chocolate and melted butter. He then adds pounding dry ingredients and minced almonds. Mix up and get a consistent mass.
Hornea: Fold the dough into the prepared mold and purple for 25 to 30 minutes, or till a stick gets wet but without raw mass remains.
Let cool: Once baked, let brownies completely cool into the mold before cutting them into squares. And ready to enjoy!

apple-cookies-with-oats-and-carrot-sugar.name: Apple Cookies With Oats And Carrot, Sugar Free
apple-cookies-with-oats-and-carrot-sugar.original_name: Μπισκότα μήλου με βρώμη και καρότο, χωρίς ζάχαρη

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon (full) of tahini or peanut butter
A few chocolate drops for garnishing
1 tablespoon (full) of tahini or peanut butter
A few chocolate drops for garnishing

instructions: Preheat the evening to 170°C in the air. Lay two baking pans or ocean sheet with non-stick paper.
Rub the carrot and apple in a thin rub and transfer to a bowl.
Add all the remaining iredients and mix them with a sponge until we have a homogeneous and supple dough.
Using the ice cream broom, leave seeds of the mixture on the baking pan, at a distance from each other so that they don't stick during baking.
Press them to spread slightly and insert 2-3 drops of chocolate on the surface. We also prepare the second baking pan.
Bake the cookies in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes and then transfer to a grill. When they cool complete, we keep them in an airtight box.
They are ideal for breakfast, lunch at school or for a healthy afternoon snack.

apple-crisp-with-cranberry-compote.name: Apple Crisp With Cranberry Compote

ingredients.item: Peeled and sliced granny smith apples

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Spread apples into a 9x9-inch baking dish. Mix brown sugar, flour, rolled oats, butter, cinnamon, and allspice together in a bowl until crumbly; sprinkle topping over apples.
Bake in the preheated oven until the crumble topping is browned and the apples are soft, 30 to 40 minutes.

Combine cranberries, white sugar, and water in a saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, and simmer, stirring often, until cranberries pop, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat; compote will thicken as it cools. Serve apple crisp topped with warm cranberry compote.

apple-pie-cinnamon-rolls.name: Apple Pie-cinnamon Rolls
instructions: Combine warm water, yeast, and 1 tablespoon sugar in a small bowl. Set aside to activate, about 5 minutes.
Mix butter, 1/2 cup sugar, eggs, and salt together in a large mixing bowl. Stir in activated yeast mixture. Stir in warm milk. Add flour 1 cup at a time, mixing well.
Knead dough on a well-floured surface, adding flour until dough is no longer sticky. Place dough in a well-greased bowl and let rise, 1 1/2 to 2 hours.

Meanwhile, combine apples and sugar for filling in a large saucepan. Let stand until juice starts to release. Place over medium-high heat and stir frequently until mixture comes to a boil. Boil hard for 1 minute, stirring frequently. Stir tapioca, lemon juice, and cinnamon into the mixture. Boil hard for 1 minute more; remove from heat.

Punch down risen dough and separate into 2 pieces. Roll out 1 piece into a large rectangle, about 9x13 inches and 1-inch thick. Spread 3 tablespoons melted butter all over the dough. Spread 1/2 of the apple mixture as evenly as possible over dough. Sprinkle 1/4 cup brown sugar evenly over apples. Roll dough as tightly as possible and squish seams together. Use a sharp knife or a piece of unflavored dental floss to slice dough into about a dozen 1-inch-thick rolls. Place rolls into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish. Repeat with second piece of dough. Let rise until doubled in size, 30 minutes to 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake rolls in the preheated oven until golden, 20 to 22 minutes.

Meanwhile, mix sugar, water, and corn syrup together in a medium-large saucepan. Bring to a boil over high heat, whisking until sugar is dissolved. Let mixture boil until it turns caramel-colored, 5 to 12 minutes, watching so that it doesn't burn. Reduce heat to low; slowly stir in cream, vanilla extract, and salt. Continue to simmer caramel topping until thickened, about 1 minute more.
Remove cinnamon rolls from the oven and drizzle with caramel while hot.

apple-rose-sangria.name: Apple Rosé Sangria
instructions: In a large pitcher, combine the green apple, red apple, lemon, simple syrup, whiskey, apple cider, and rosé. Stir well, then chill until ready to serve, up to 2 days.
Immediately before serving, add the sparkling apple cider and stir to incorporate.
Pour into glasses and garnish with lemon wedges.
Enjoy!

apple-walnut-canadian-butter-tarts.name: Apple Walnut Canadian Butter Tarts
instructions: Dust a work surface with flour and roll out pie dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch. Cut out 12 circles using a 4-inch round pastry cutter,
Transfer dough into lightly sprayed muffin tin. Press the dough gently into the bottom and sides. Refrigerate while you prepare the filling.
Add apple juice into a saucepan and simmer over medium-high heat until it has reduced to 3 or 4 tablespoons of apple syrup. Set aside.
Place brown sugar into a bowl and pour apple syrup on top of the sugar. Add melted butter, egg, cream, vanilla, and salt. Whisk until filling is liquid and smooth.
Pull pastry out of the fridge. Divide walnuts evenly on top of the bottom of the tart shells. Pour filling on top about 2/3 full. Tap the pan to smooth out filling.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is cooked through and the filling is bubbly, about 20 minutes. Let cool for about 10 minutes then remove from the muffin tins and serve at room temperature.
Serve and enjoy!

aranitas-shredded-green-plantain-patties.name: Aranitas (shredded Green Plantain Patties)
instructions: Heat canola oil in a deep-fryer or large saucepan to 191°C (190 degrees C). Gather about 2 tablespoons of shredded plantains and shape into patties.
Fry the patties in the preheated oil until golden and crispy, about 10 minutes. Drain on paper towels and season with garlic salt.

arepa-recipe-with-devils-and-cheese-come.name: Arepa Recipe With Devils And Cheese
arepa-recipe-with-devils-and-cheese-come.original_name: Receta de arepa con diablitos y queso
instructions: En un bol, incorpora el agua y diluye la sal.
It progressively adds early maize flour and mixes into a soft and manageable mass.
If you need more water or flour, you can add without problems.
Divide la masa en porciones iguales y dales forma de bolita.
Aplana las bolitas para formar la arepa y queden como un disco, bien redonditas con aproximadamente 1,5 cm de grosor.
Calienta una plancha con el aceite vegetal.
Coloca las arepas y cocina por ambos lados a fuego medio hasta que queden doraditas y con una costra crujiente.
Once ready, open them in half with a plastic knife so that the internal mass doesn't stick to the Utensil.
Unta las arepas con la mantequilla hasta que se derrita.
Filling with a portion of the daddies and adds cheese to its taste.
Serve and enjoy it once and for all.

arepas-recipe-in-air-fryer-comedera.name: Arepas Recipe In Air Fryer
arepas-recipe-in-air-fryer-comedera.original_name: Receta de arepas en freidora de aire
instructions: Inicia la receta y calienta una olla con agua.
Luego, vierte el agua en un bol y sazona el agua con sal y mezcla hasta que tome sabor.
Fold early and with the help of a pallet or your hands, mix well till a soft mass forms.
Now, preheat the air fryer at 180 ° C
It moistens your hands and takes a lump of dough and forms the arepa with its light till it's round.
Coloca la arepa en el agua hirviendo y deja por 4 minutos. Posteriormente, retira del agua, escurre un poco y lleva a la freidora de aire.
Cooking from 7 to 10 minutes more at 160 ° C, till crispy and ready.
Disfrutas tus arepas como gustes.

aromatic-wilted-greens-with-coconut-milk.name: Aromatic Wilted Greens With Coconut Milk

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves torn
ribs and stems removed, leaves sliced 1-inch thick

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook garlic, stirring, until golden brown, about 3 minutes. Add shallots, chile, ginger, and two-thirds of scallions. Season with salt; cook, stirring often, until softened, about 5 minutes. Add kale and collard greens a handful at a time, letting them wilt slightly before adding more. Cook, tossing occasionally, until greens are crisp-tender, 6–8 minutes. Add half of coconut milk and toss to coat.
Transfer greens to a serving bowl and top with remaining coconut milk and scallions. Serve with lime wedges.

artichoke-cherry-tomato-and-feta-salad-w.name: Artichoke, Cherry Tomato, And Feta Salad With Artichoke-pesto Crostini

ingredients.item: Finely chopped fresh italian parsley plus additional for sprinkling
Container yellow and red cherry tomatoes

instructions:
Place all ingredients in processor. Blend until finely chopped. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Pesto can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Whisk shallot, vinegar, 2 tablespoons chopped parsley, mustard, and garlic in medium bowl. Gradually whisk in oil. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Spread 1 tablespoon pesto over each baguette slice. Sprinkle parsley over crostini.

Mix baby greens, artichoke hearts, and cherry tomatoes in very large bowl. Toss with enough dressing to coat lightly. Sprinkle feta over and serve salad with crostini.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
